name: On-Premise (bars, restaurants, stadiums)
notes: High-touch, event-sensitive. Big swing on football weekends + festivals.

name: Off-Premise Chain (Publix, Walmart, Target)
notes: Volume anchor. National pricing ladders; exposed to promo calendars.

name: Off-Premise Independent (c-stores, liquor stores)
notes: Regional/local. Red Bull skew higher here than chain channel.
